summary: Diff adds frontend UI for graceful backend-connection failures (error card + retry) and adjusts query hooks to throw when actor is missing. However, the diff does not show an explicit fix for the production deployment failure root cause or any build/deploy logging, and it does not provide clear evidence of production canister-ID resolution changes. It also appears to introduce an unrequested change to predefined ingredient data (adding “Dahi”).

missing_requirements.requirement: Identify and fix the root cause of the production deployment failure (generic "Deployment error") and capture a brief developer-readable explanation in build/deploy logs/output (not shown to end users).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows code changes but no evidence of (a) identifying the deployment root cause, (b) fixing a deploy-time failure mode, or (c) adding developer-readable build/deploy logging/output explaining the original failure.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure frontend actor configuration resolves the correct backend canister ID in production (avoiding "Canister Id not resolved") and fails gracefully with a clear English error state + retry, without editing immutable hook files.
missing_requirements.reason: Graceful error UI and retry are implemented outside immutable hook files, but the diff summary does not show any change that specifically ensures correct production canister ID resolution (e.g., environment-based canister ID wiring).

missing_requirements.requirement: Trigger a new production deployment and verify end-to-end on live app that saving a daily record and viewing it in History/Record Details works, and copy/export actions have no regressions.
missing_requirements.reason: Deployment triggering and live end-to-end verification are not evidenced in the code diff summary; only code changes are shown.

hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists deployment/connectivity fixes as goals and states changing predefined ingredient lists is a non-goal unless required for the deployment/runtime issue; adding a new ingredient is not requested by REQ-19/20/21.

hallucinated_features.description: Relaxed form validation/behavior (defaults blank numeric inputs to 0, allows partially filled rows, skips invalid entries).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-19/20/21 and may violate the non-goal of changing form behavior unless required for the deployment/runtime issue; diff summary claims this change but it is unrelated to deployment/connectivity.
